title: Dual-Axis Subspace-Partitioned Representation Learning
approach: Structural gradient isolation via disjoint 4-dim subspaces
key_findings: v5 is the FIRST configuration to simultaneously meet both targets: reward Spearman rho >= 0.163 AND hand accuracy >= 0.620
Reward subspace (dims 0:4) achieves rho=0.543, outperforming pure reward-only v1 (0.163) by 3.3x
Hand subspace (dims 4:8) achieves 67.6% accuracy vs hand-only baseline of 62.8%

Structural isolation is partially verified: hand subspace reward rho = 0.087 (near-chance), but reward subspace hand accuracy = 0.575 (above chance 0.333) suggesting some soft entanglement via shared hidden layers
VICReg correctly pushed full embedding to effective_dim_80 = 3 (from near-1 collapse in hand-only)
The hand subspace (dims 4:8) slightly outperforms the full embedding for hand accuracy (0.676 vs 0.652), confirming signal concentration in its designated subspace
